title: ERP Software for Civil Contractors | SiteFlow
metaTitle: ERP Software for Civil Contractors | SiteFlow
metaDescription: Manage & track multiple projects easily with super easy software for civil contractors. Trusted by 1 Lakh+ users
author: SiteFlow Operations Team
body:
Construction Software for Civil Contractors
Run Every Site.
Not Just One.
Civil contractors lose control when they cannot see all sites at once. Labour faked, materials short, equipment idle. SiteFlow gives you one place for all of it, from any phone.
✓
GPS attendance across all sites — no registers, no calls
✓
Material tracking with PO matching — stop paying for what never arrived
✓
Live budget vs actual — catch overruns before they compound
✓
DPR from site in one tap — office gets it instantly

The Problem
Why Civil Projects Go Over Budget
Every civil contractor faces the same problems. Most accept them as normal. They are not.
📋 Site Register — Day 14
Raju Kumar — Mason
✕ Off-site location
Suresh Helper
✕ Not verified
Ahmed Painter
⚠ Marked absent
Fake Attendance
Supervisors mark registers manually. Workers who were never on site get counted. Payroll calculations are wrong every month and disputes follow.
📦 Material vs PO — Site A
TMT Bars
12 bundles short
Cement Bags
40 unmatched
Material Wastage
Materials are ordered over the phone. No one checks delivery against the purchase order. Over-ordering and losses are discovered only after handover.
📄 DPR Status
⚠
Earthwork DPR — 3 days overdue
⚠
RCC Work DPR — not submitted
Formwork DPR — submitted today
Delayed Daily Reports
Site engineers send updates over WhatsApp days after the work happens. By the time office knows about a problem, the damage is already done.
💰 Subcontractor Bill — Ramesh Civil
Claimed: 4,200 sqft
Unverified

Measured: 3,140 sqft
Actual
Subcontractor Overbilling
Subcontractors bill for more work than was actually executed. Without measured quantities linked to bills, there is no way to catch it before payment goes out.

No Live Project P&L
Project cost is visible only after every bill is in — usually after handover. By then there is nothing to fix. A ₹38L overrun that built up over six months shows up as one number at the end, with no point in the timeline where action was possible.
How It Works
How SiteFlow Works for Civil Contractors
From first day on site to the final P&L report — every step connected, every gap closed.
COLOR: SVG connector rose 01: Left — COLOR: pin rose
01
Set Up Your Project and Start Tracking
Your onboarding manager loads the project structure, BOQ items, rate library, and vendor master before you go live. From day one, every worker clocks in via GPS and face recognition — so attendance is verified before the first day’s wage is counted.
BOQ & BudgetingRate LibraryGPS AttendanceFace Recognition
02: Right — COLOR: pin rose-light
02
Monitor Site Progress and Materials Daily
Site engineers submit DPRs with geo-tagged photos and issue flags directly from the app — office sees it the same moment. Every material request goes through the system linked to the project budget, and deliveries are matched against purchase orders before any bill moves forward.
Daily Progress ReportsIssue TrackingMaterial ManagementGRN Matching
03: Left — COLOR: pin rose
03
Approve Bills and See Live P&L
Vendor and subcontractor bills go through a multi-level approval flow — nothing gets paid without the right sign-off. As bills come in and work progresses, project P&L updates automatically. Management gets 50+ reports without asking anyone to compile them.
Vendor BillingMulti-level ApprovalsProject P&L50+ ReportsTally Sync
Platform Features
Everything Civil Contractors Need. One Platform.
The three modules below cover where civil projects lose money — materials, site visibility, and unverified labour costs.
ROW 1: Material
📦 Material Management
Monitor Material Inventory
A civil contractor needs to take on multiple projects and with those multiple projects, material management gets hard. With SiteFlow, you can monitor and track your complete material inventory across every site from one screen.
✓
Avoid material wastage by tracking usage against project budget in real time
✓
Generate PO, bills and quotations digitally — no phone calls to vendors
✓
Match every delivery against the purchase order before approving payment
✓
Task and progress tracking linked to material consumption per activity

📋 Progress Tracking
Track & Monitor Site Progress 24×7
Manage your construction projects on mobile and get real-time updates in office with SiteFlow. No more waiting for evening calls or morning WhatsApp messages to know what happened on site yesterday.
✓
Connect office to site — every update visible the moment it is submitted
✓
Create DPR in a click — site engineer submits from phone in under a minute
✓
Track issues and delays in real time — flagged with photos and location
✓

ROW 3: Workforce
📍 Workforce Management
Digitize Workforce Management
There can be multiple people working under a civil contractor and it is necessary to keep track of them. SiteFlow replaces the manual register with GPS attendance and face recognition so every wage is calculated from verified data.
✓
Monitor daily attendance using GPS — location proof on every record
✓
Manage labour contractors — track workers across all subcontracted gangs
✓
Manage labour attendance and salary from verified punch-in data
✓
Generate digital payslips directly from the platform — no manual calculation
See this in a demo →

FAQ
FAQ
Questions About SiteFlow for Civil Contractors
Everything you need to know before booking a demo.
ERP software for civil contractors is a platform that connects site execution, labour management, material tracking, subcontractor billing, and financial reporting in one system. Instead of managing attendance on registers, materials on phone calls, and costs on spreadsheets, everything flows through a single platform. SiteFlow is built specifically for construction — not adapted from generic business software — so features like GPS attendance, GRN matching, and DPR submission are standard, not add-ons.
Yes. SiteFlow is designed for multi-site operations. You get a consolidated dashboard showing progress, cost, attendance, and material status across all active sites simultaneously. Material libraries, vendor masters, and rate libraries are shared centrally so you do not set them up site by site. Civil contractors on SiteFlow typically manage between 3 and 20 simultaneous projects.
Workers punch in from their phone using the SiteFlow app. The GPS coordinates at the time of punch-in are recorded and matched against the defined site boundary. Face recognition adds a second layer of verification. If a worker marks attendance from outside the site area, the system flags it. Payroll is then calculated from verified attendance only — not from what the supervisor recorded on paper. This eliminates proxy attendance and reduces wage disputes significantly.
SiteFlow is purpose-built for civil contractors in India and the Middle East. Unlike generic tools like Asana or Monday that are built for office teams, SiteFlow includes GPS attendance, DPR submission, material GRN matching, subcontractor billing linked to measured quantities, and Tally integration — all standard. It is used by civil contractors managing road, bridge, drainage, building, and infrastructure projects across India.
Subcontractor billing in SiteFlow is linked directly to measured work quantities. Work orders are created with agreed rates and scope. Bills are raised against completed and verified quantities only — not what the subcontractor claims. Multi-level approval workflows ensure no bill moves forward without the right sign-offs. Retention amounts are tracked and released only at defined milestones. This removes the most common cause of overpayment on civil projects.
Most civil contractors go live within 1 to 3 days. Your dedicated onboarding manager loads your project structure, BOQ, rate library, vendor master, and material library before your team logs in for the first time. No IT team required. Training is done in short module-wise sessions in Hindi or English, and your manager stays reachable for the first 30 days. Site engineers who have never used construction software are typically entering DPRs within their first week.
Yes. SiteFlow has a two-way integration with Tally ERP and Zoho Books. Purchase orders, vendor invoices, subcontractor bills, and client receipts sync automatically. Your accounts team stays on Tally while site and project teams work on SiteFlow. No double entry, no manual exports needed at month end.
Material requests on SiteFlow go through the system and are linked to the project budget and BOQ quantities. Purchase orders are raised digitally. Every delivery is recorded as a GRN and matched against the purchase order — if quantities do not match, the system flags it before the bill is approved. Stock levels update in real time, so over-ordering is visible before the next order is placed. Civil contractors using SiteFlow typically see material waste reduce within the first project cycle.
